'''Kalon Lenitor''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] and a legendary [[ghestslayer]]. He lived with his family in an island south-east of [[Equator City/Legends|Equator City]]. He fathered an only child, his daughter [[Vadon Lenitor|Vadon]], and he and the rest of the loving family raised her in their ways. They managed to raise a Rodian [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] without the usual attitude of Rodian bounty hunters.<ref name="AIR" />
